data.title: Cognite establishes Abu Dhabi entity to boost industrial AI adoption globally. #AI #AbuDhabi
data.description: Phoenix-based company Cognite has recently established a new entity in Abu Dhabi as part of its efforts to boost the adoption of industrial Artificial Intelligence (AI) in the region. This expansion marks a significant step in the company's global growth strategy. By setting up this new entity, Cognite aims to enhance its presence and offerings in Abu Dhabi and leverage the emerging opportunities in the industrial AI sector. This move reflects the company's commitment to driving innovation and supporting digital transformation within the region.

data.title: Price of MATIC could hit $0.58 soon, then rally to $1.70-$2.10 by Q4 2025. Support at $0.35 crucial. Analysts predict 52% surge.
data.description: The MATIC price is anticipated to experience a significant increase of 52%, reaching a resistance level of $0.58, followed by potential targets of $1.70-$2.10 as per analysts' projections. It is crucial that the critical support level at $0.35 remains intact to sustain this upward trend.

data.title: US government facing pressure as interest payments hit $1.2 trillion, may need lower rates to prevent debt from worsening.
data.description: The Kobeissi Letter recently pointed out that the U.S. government is facing increasing pressure from interest payments, with Federal Reserve potentially needing to make significant cuts to interest rates to avoid debt servicing becoming unmanageable. The post highlighted that U.S. Treasury interest payments have surged to a record $1.2 trillion in the past year according to Bank of America's Global Research team. It warned that if this trend continues, annual interest expenses could reach $1.4 trillion by 2026 if interest rates remain unchanged, emphasizing the strain of rising borrowing costs. The post emphasized the importance of the Fed lowering rates at its upcoming meeting to alleviate the financial burden on the government.

data.title: China is still grappling with a property crisis 5 years later, as government measures to curb speculation continue to weigh on real estate values, affecting the economy.
data.description: Efforts by the government to curb speculation have resulted in a decline in real estate values across the country. This slowdown is ongoing and has had significant economic impacts.

data.title: SOL price set to break out to $220 in 2 weeks, supported by bullish technicals. $215 resistance is critical obstacle.
data.description: Solana's SOL cryptocurrency is displaying significant strength, currently aiming for a short-term price target of $220 guided by breakout patterns and bullish signals from the MACD indicator. However, the crucial obstacle at $215 must be overcome to achieve this target.

data.title: Bitcoin price dips by over 2% in less than 10 minutes on Sunday due to actions of prominent Bitcoin whales.
data.description: On Sunday, the price of Bitcoin experienced a sudden plummet of more than 2% in less than 10 minutes. Crypto investors on X platform attributed this sharp decline to the activities of a single massive Bitcoin holder.
